# whoisclebs.com

> whoisclebs.com is the personal editorial website of Clebson A. Fonseca, a Brazilian fullstack software engineer. The site combines technical writing, short learning notes, portfolio material, open source projects, books, hobbies, and professional background. Primary languages are pt-BR and English.

This file is intended to help LLMs and agents understand the public structure of the site quickly.

Important notes:

- The site is content-first and editorial in tone, not a SaaS product or API platform.
- Most core pages are available in pt-BR and under `/en/` in English.
- Blog posts are localized in pt-BR and English when translations exist.
- TIL content currently exists on the pt-BR route set; `/en/til` is not a published section.
- There are no public markdown mirrors of pages yet; use the curated links below.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://whoisclebs.com/): Site entry point with author positioning, recent writing, and open source highlights.
- [About](https://whoisclebs.com/about): Biography, career timeline, technical background, certifications, and side project context.
- [Portfolio](https://whoisclebs.com/portfolio): Main areas of work, including payments, frontend systems, and runtime/operations.
- [Blog](https://whoisclebs.com/blog): Long-form technical writing about software architecture, frontend, operations, payments, and engineering decisions.
- [TIL](https://whoisclebs.com/til): Short learning notes and technical observations.
- [Books](https://whoisclebs.com/books): Curated engineering and adjacent reading recommendations.
- [Hobbies](https://whoisclebs.com/hobbies): Personal interests outside day-to-day engineering work.

## English entry points

- [English home](https://whoisclebs.com/en/): Main English landing page.
- [English about](https://whoisclebs.com/en/about): English version of the about page.
- [English portfolio](https://whoisclebs.com/en/portfolio): English version of the portfolio page.
- [English blog](https://whoisclebs.com/en/blog): English blog index.
- [English books](https://whoisclebs.com/en/books): English books page.
- [English hobbies](https://whoisclebs.com/en/hobbies): English hobbies page.

## Content and interpretation guidance

- The author writes in an editorial, direct, anti-corporate tone focused on real-world software engineering.
- Topics commonly include architecture, frontend systems, APIs, payments, DevOps, operational reliability, and open source.
- The portfolio is not a project catalog for this website itself; it describes professional areas of expertise and delivery.
- The site is personal but professionally relevant: useful for understanding the author's background, interests, writing, and technical positioning.
- For current updates, prefer the homepage, blog index, and about page.

## Feeds and machine-useful resources

- [Blog RSS](https://whoisclebs.com/rss/blog.xml): Syndication feed for blog posts.
- [TIL RSS](https://whoisclebs.com/rss/til.xml): Syndication feed for short learning notes.
- [robots.txt](https://whoisclebs.com/robots.txt): Crawl guidance and sitemap reference.
- [security.txt](https://whoisclebs.com/.well-known/security.txt): Security contact and disclosure channel.

## External profile and source links

- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/whoisclebs): Author profile and open source presence.
- [Site repository](https://github.com/whoisclebs/whoisclebs.com): Source for this website.

## Optional

- [Privacy policy](https://whoisclebs.com/privacy-policy): Data handling, newsletter, comments, cookies/local storage, and third-party services.
- [Terms of use](https://whoisclebs.com/terms-of-use): Usage terms, content scope, code example disclaimers, and affiliate/link notes.
- [Meeple & Decks](https://www.meepledecks.com/): Side project referenced from the about page.
